name: PumaCC Skills Marketplace
description: Reusable Claude Code skills maintained by PumaCC. Each skill is a self-contained capability pack installable into any Claude agent.

skills.name: API Conventions
skills.description: Consume, debug, and integrate REST APIs with retry strategies, error handling, and production patterns.

skills.name: Frontend Design
skills.description: Frontend development with React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS. Build landing pages, dashboards, forms, components.

skills.name: GitHub
skills.description: Interact with GitHub using the gh CLI. Issues, PRs, CI runs, and advanced API queries.

skills.name: Bitwarden Secrets
skills.description: Manage secrets with Bitwarden Secrets Manager. Auto-sync secrets to env vars and SSH key files via sync-bws.

skills.name: Server Setup
skills.description: Provision a new server via setup.yaml Ansible playbook. Covers user creation, packages, Node.js, Claude Code, swap, fail2ban, and Bitwarden-resolved profile vars.

skills.name: Agent Setup
skills.description: Provision a remote OpenClaw agent node: SSH keys, git identity, home repo, openclaw install, systemd service, extensions, and cron sync. No Ansible.

skills.name: Nginx Proxy
skills.description: Set up Nginx as a TLS reverse proxy with Let's Encrypt and WebSocket support via proxy.yaml Ansible playbook.
